---
title: "RIP-seq: eIF3d TE activity vs eIF4E binding"
author: "Kate"
date: "2026-05"
output: html_document
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r libraries}
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(cowplot)
```

# Does eIF3d-dependent translation increase as eIF4E binding decreases?

For each timepoint, join eIF4E RIP log2FC with eIF3d TE LFC and fit a regression.
Negative slope = genes with lower eIF4E binding tend to have higher eIF3d-dependent TE.

```{r define_files}
tp_map <- list(
  normoxia_1hr = list(
    rip = here("ripseq", "output", "ripseq_deseq_normoxia_1hr_eif4e_vs_igg.csv"),
    te  = here("output", "translation_categories_si3d_vs_sictrl_normoxia_1and4hr.csv")
  ),
  hypoxia_1hr = list(
    rip = here("ripseq", "output", "ripseq_deseq_hypoxia_1hr_eif4e_vs_igg.csv"),
    te  = here("output", "translation_categories_si3d_vs_sictrl_hypoxia_1hr.csv")
  ),
  hypoxia_4hr = list(
    rip = here("ripseq", "output", "ripseq_deseq_hypoxia_4hr_eif4e_vs_igg.csv"),
    te  = here("output", "translation_categories_si3d_vs_sictrl_hypoxia_4hr.csv")
  ),
  hypoxia_24hr = list(
    rip = here("ripseq", "output", "ripseq_deseq_hypoxia_24hr_eif4e_vs_igg.csv"),
    te  = here("output", "translation_categories_si3d_vs_sictrl_hypoxia_24hr.csv")
  )
)
```

```{r scatter_function}
make_scatter <- function(tp_name, paths) {
  rip_df <- read_csv(paths$rip, show_col_types = FALSE) |>
    filter(!is.na(log2FoldChange)) |>
    mutate(gene_id_clean = sub("\\..*", "", gene_id)) |>
    dplyr::select(gene_id_clean, eif4e_lfc = log2FoldChange)

  te_df <- read_csv(paths$te, show_col_types = FALSE) |>
    filter(!is.na(te_lfc)) |>
    mutate(gene_id_clean = sub("\\..*", "", gene_id)) |>
    dplyr::select(gene_id_clean, te_lfc)

  joined <- inner_join(rip_df, te_df, by = "gene_id_clean")
  cat(tp_name, "| genes after join:", nrow(joined), "\n")

  cor_res   <- cor.test(joined$eif4e_lfc, joined$te_lfc, method = "spearman")
  cor_label <- paste0("Spearman r = ", round(cor_res$estimate, 3),
                      "\np = ", signif(cor_res$p.value, 2))

  ggplot(joined, aes(x = eif4e_lfc, y = te_lfc)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.15, size = 0.4, color = "grey40") +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "#56B4E9", linewidth = 0.8, se = TRUE) +
    annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.4,
             label = cor_label, size = 3) +
    labs(title    = tp_name,
         x        = "log2FC (eIF4E IP / IgG)",
         y        = "eIF3d TE log2FC (sictrl / si3d)") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 12)
}
```

```{r scatter_plots, fig.width=10, fig.height=8}
scatter_plots <- mapply(make_scatter, names(tp_map), tp_map, SIMPLIFY = FALSE)
plot_grid(plotlist = scatter_plots, ncol = 2, labels = "AUTO")
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "05_eif3d_te_vs_eif4e_binding.pdf"), width = 10, height = 8)
```
